objective: Return a productivity/framing decision to Jen after Moss identifies it is outside technical ownership.
context: The next action is commitment framing, not infrastructure or runtime implementation.
decisions_made: Moss should not mutate productivity state or reframe commitments by default.
open_constraints: Any later technical automation should come back to Moss as a bounded execution request.
next_action: Jen decides the productivity framing and, if needed, creates a bounded technical request for Moss.
privacy_constraints: No private routine details or personal context in public examples.
